_description: System (global) block — already installed for every site. You do NOT create it; reference it by slug in a page's blocks[], or tag a blog post with vayapin_pins to auto-render a strip. Renders a grid of VayaPin location cards (logo/photo + pin id + title + subtitle → vayapin.com/CC:NAME).
name: VayaPin Cards

_usage_page_block._comment: Add to a page's blocks[]. Two modes — set `pins` for an exact set, OR a query (country/city/category/q). `pins` wins if both are set.

pins.title: Pin ids
pins.description: Explicit ids like "BB:TAPAS". Pinned mode — exact cards in order. Ignores the query fields when set.

_resolve_ids: Resolve valid pin ids first: GET /api/v1/content/vayapin/cards?q=tapas&country=bb (or ?pins=BB:TAPAS to verify). Only public + listed pins render; unknown ones are skipped.
_on_posts: To put a card strip on a blog POST instead of a page, set the post's `vayapin_pins` field (editor pill picker, the API field, or `spideriq content posts update <id> --vayapin-pins "BB:TAPAS,BB:CHAMPERS"`). The blog template renders the strip automatically — no block needed.
